overview.about: The Great Wall of China, built and rebuilt between the 7th century BC and 17th century AD, stretches over 21,196km across northern China. Constructed by millions of workers over two millennia, it is the longest man-made structure on Earth. The most visited section at Badaling draws over 10 million visitors annually.

highlights.label: 21,196km — Earth's Longest Structure
highlights.desc: Built across 2,000 years by emperors from the Zhou to the Ming dynasty — using millions of workers including prisoners

highlights.label: 7th Century BC to 17th Century AD
highlights.desc: Sections built over 2,000 years span every Chinese dynasty — each with its own construction technique and purpose

highlights.label: Mutianyu & Jinshanling Untouched Sections
highlights.desc: Away from touristy Badaling, crumbling watchtowers draped in mist deliver the China of your imagination

highlights.label: Watchtowers at Every Peak
highlights.desc: Over 25,000 watchtowers guard the wall — climbing them at dawn and looking both ways is a defining travel moment

overview.about: Forbidden City in Beijing, CN exemplifies China's extraordinary 5,000-year civilisation. This celebrated heritage landmark site draws millions of visitors annually who come to witness the vision, engineering and artistry that made China one of the ancient world's most advanced nations.

highlights.label: Centuries of Living History
highlights.desc: Structures standing for hundreds to thousands of years — each stone a silent chronicle of empires and civilisations

highlights.label: UNESCO World Heritage Site
highlights.desc: Recognised globally for outstanding universal value and protected as one of Earth's most significant cultural landmarks

highlights.label: Iconic Photography Spot
highlights.desc: Panoramic vistas, intricate carvings and sunrise silhouettes that appear on bucket lists worldwide — every angle tells a story

highlights.label: Architectural Masterpiece
highlights.desc: Precision engineering predating modern tools — symmetry, scale and craftsmanship that continues to baffle experts today

overview.about: The Bund in Shanghai, CN exemplifies China's extraordinary 5,000-year civilisation. This celebrated city destination site draws millions of visitors annually who come to witness the vision, engineering and artistry that made China one of the ancient world's most advanced nations.

highlights.label: Iconic Skyline & Architecture
highlights.desc: A skyline recognised across the globe — towers, bridges and boulevards that define an entire era of human design

highlights.label: World-Class Arts & Culture
highlights.desc: World-class museums, galleries, theatres and street art that shape global trends in fashion, film and music

highlights.label: Legendary Cuisine & Markets
highlights.desc: A melting pot of culinary traditions — street food, fine dining and bustling markets all within easy reach

highlights.label: Vibrant Nightlife & Events
highlights.desc: Rooftop bars, jazz clubs, night markets and international festivals keep the city electric long after dark

highlights.label: Biodiversity Hotspot
highlights.desc: Home to rare and endemic species — flora and fauna found nowhere else on the planet within pristine ecosystems

highlights.label: World-Renowned Trekking
highlights.desc: Trails from leisurely nature walks to multi-day high-altitude expeditions with breathtaking panoramic rewards

highlights.label: Wildlife Encounters
highlights.desc: Spot iconic wildlife in their natural habitat — guided walks dramatically increase sighting rates of rare species

highlights.label: Dramatic Natural Landscapes
highlights.desc: Awe-inspiring vistas of mountains, gorges, waterfalls and geological formations sculpted over millions of years

highlights.label: UNESCO World Heritage Site
highlights.desc: Recognised globally for outstanding universal value and protected as one of Earth's most significant cultural landmarks

highlights.label: Iconic Photography Spot
highlights.desc: Panoramic vistas, intricate carvings and sunrise silhouettes that appear on bucket lists worldwide — every angle tells a story

highlights.label: Architectural Masterpiece
highlights.desc: Precision engineering predating modern tools — symmetry, scale and craftsmanship that continues to baffle experts today

overview.about: Northern Lhasa Old Town in Lhasa, CN exemplifies China's extraordinary 5,000-year civilisation. This celebrated city destination site draws millions of visitors annually who come to witness the vision, engineering and artistry that made China one of the ancient world's most advanced nations.

highlights.label: Iconic Skyline & Architecture
highlights.desc: A skyline recognised across the globe — towers, bridges and boulevards that define an entire era of human design

highlights.label: World-Class Arts & Culture
highlights.desc: World-class museums, galleries, theatres and street art that shape global trends in fashion, film and music

highlights.label: Legendary Cuisine & Markets
highlights.desc: A melting pot of culinary traditions — street food, fine dining and bustling markets all within easy reach

highlights.label: Vibrant Nightlife & Events
highlights.desc: Rooftop bars, jazz clubs, night markets and international festivals keep the city electric long after dark

overview.about: Historic Lhasa National Park in Lhasa, CN exemplifies China's extraordinary 5,000-year civilisation. This celebrated natural wonder site draws millions of visitors annually who come to witness the vision, engineering and artistry that made China one of the ancient world's most advanced nations.

highlights.label: Biodiversity Hotspot
highlights.desc: Home to rare and endemic species — flora and fauna found nowhere else on the planet within pristine ecosystems

highlights.label: World-Renowned Trekking
highlights.desc: Trails from leisurely nature walks to multi-day high-altitude expeditions with breathtaking panoramic rewards

highlights.label: Wildlife Encounters
highlights.desc: Spot iconic wildlife in their natural habitat — guided walks dramatically increase sighting rates of rare species

highlights.label: Dramatic Natural Landscapes
highlights.desc: Awe-inspiring vistas of mountains, gorges, waterfalls and geological formations sculpted over millions of years
